message:
feat: add einsum, custom autograd functions, scatter_add, and expanded nn layers

Add tensor_einsum with full subscript parsing and multi-operand support,
tensor_apply_function for custom autograd, tensor_scatter_add, and
expand nn module with additional layer variants. Includes FunctionCtx
integration in autograd and CPU kernel extensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
